case_title: EDUAR RENE FLORES LOPEZ VS. HECTOR PASTRANA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, EDUAR RENE FLORES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SCHUSTIKOW, WALTER DEFENDANT SCHUSTIKOV IS NOT LIABLE UNDER VEHICLE CODE 17150 BECAUSE OF A LACK OF EVIDENCE OF NEGLIGENCE ON THE PART OF THE DRIVER OF HIS VEHICLE. NOR IS THERE EVIDENCE TO SUPPORT A CLAIM OF NEGLIGENT ENTRUSTMENT. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HECTOR PASTRANA IS DISMISSED AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT HECTOR PASTRANA TO JAN-08-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER JEAN GARASCIA. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LOPEZ, EDUAR RENE FLORES AS TO DEFENDANT PASTRANA, HECTOR SCHUSTIKOW, WALTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-08-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE FOR HECTOR PASTRANA. PLAINTIFF EDUAR RENE FLORES LOPEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS HECTOR PASTRAMA AND WALTER SCHOSTIKOW ARE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION PLAINTIFF'S CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, EDUAR RENE FLORES
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-27-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO HECTOR PASTRANA ONLY TO SEP-28-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF EDUAR RENE FLORES LOPEZ IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY DANIEL NAVARRO, CERTIFIED COURT SPANISH INTERPRETER. DEFENDANTS HECTOR PASTRAMA AND WALTER SCHOSTIKOW ARE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE NOT STATED SERVED MAY-28-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCHUSTIKOW, WALTER
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, EDUAR RENE FLORES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-08-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM RICHARD GROTCH. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST DEFENDANT HECTOR PASTRANA IS DISMISSED; NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF EDUAR RENE FLORES LOPEZ IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY NINA SAFDIE, CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER. DEFENDANTS HECTOR PASTRAMA AND WALTER SCHOSTIKOW ARE NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: RICHARD GROTCH; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2018 - JUDGMENT.
